_comment: Single source of truth for everything this repo installs. Edit here; README.md and docs/tools-guide.md are generated from this file via scripts/lib/generate-docs.sh. Icon slugs come from https://simpleicons.org — set null if no logo exists. kind = short category label shown in docs (CLI, GUI app, Shell plugin, Font, etc.).

scripts.title: System Foundation
scripts.summary: Bootstraps the toolchain everything else builds on.

scripts.title: Terminal & Shell
scripts.summary: Modern terminals plus a productive Zsh setup.

scripts.title: Version Managers & Runtimes
scripts.summary: Per-project Node and Python versions, plus Bun.

scripts.title: Programming Languages
scripts.summary: Standalone language runtimes for full-stack and mobile work.

scripts.title: Frontend & Mobile CLIs
scripts.summary: The heart of the setup — global CLIs for the modern JS ecosystem.

scripts.title: Editors & Git Tools
scripts.summary: Editors, AI coding agents, Git tooling.

scripts.title: Mobile (Android)
scripts.summary: Android Studio + environment. Full RN/iOS env lives in script 12.

scripts.title: Productivity & Utilities
scripts.summary: Window mgmt, browsers, API tools, and other day-to-day apps.

scripts.title: Databases
scripts.summary: PostgreSQL plus GUI clients and Supabase tooling.

scripts.title: Developer Fonts
scripts.summary: Programming fonts with ligatures and Nerd Font glyphs.

scripts.title: Expo + React Native (full env)
scripts.summary: Complete local Expo / React Native env, including iOS toolchain. Superset of scripts 04 + 07 for mobile.

tools.name: Xcode Command Line Tools
tools.description: Apple's compiler suite (clang, git, make, swift). Required by Homebrew and most other tools.

tools.name: Homebrew
tools.description: The missing package manager for macOS. Every later script builds on `brew`.

tools.name: iTerm2
tools.description: Advanced terminal emulator with split panes, search, paste history. Dracula theme is preconfigured.

tools.name: Warp
tools.description: Modern AI-powered terminal with block-based output and command palette.

tools.name: Oh My Zsh
tools.description: Framework for managing Zsh config — plugins, themes, completions.

tools.name: PowerLevel10k
tools.description: Extremely fast Zsh prompt theme. Shows git status, runtime info, language versions.

tools.name: Dracula Theme
tools.description: Dark color scheme for iTerm2 + PowerLevel10k. High contrast, low eye strain.

tools.name: zsh-autosuggestions
tools.description: Suggests commands as you type, based on history. Right-arrow to accept.

tools.name: zsh-syntax-highlighting
tools.description: Colors commands as you type — green for valid, red for typos.

tools.name: Volta
tools.description: Fast Rust-based Node.js version manager. Pins versions per project automatically.

tools.name: pyenv
tools.description: Python version manager. Multiple versions side by side, per-project pinning.

tools.name: Node.js (LTS)
tools.description: JavaScript runtime. Installed at the LTS version via Volta.

tools.name: pnpm
tools.description: Fast, disk-efficient package manager. Default in this setup over npm/yarn.

tools.name: Bun
tools.description: All-in-one JS runtime, bundler, test runner, package manager. Installed via its own Homebrew tap.

tools.name: OpenJDK 17
tools.description: Java 17 runtime. Required by Gradle for Android/React Native builds.

tools.name: Go
tools.description: Statically-typed language by Google. Used by Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform internally.

tools.name: Ruby
tools.description: Dynamic interpreted language. Required by CocoaPods and many DevOps tools.

tools.name: Vue CLI
tools.description: Scaffolding and tooling for Vue.js projects.

tools.name: Nuxt CLI
tools.description: Scaffolding and dev tools for Nuxt 3+ apps.

tools.name: TypeScript
tools.description: Typed superset of JavaScript. Installed globally.

tools.name: create-vite
tools.description: Project scaffold for Vite — fast dev server and bundler.

tools.name: serve
tools.description: Quick static-file server for testing built sites locally.

tools.name: Turborepo
tools.description: Incremental bundler/build system for JS monorepos.

tools.name: Vercel CLI
tools.description: Deploy Next.js / Nuxt / static sites to Vercel from the terminal.

tools.name: Storyblok CLI
tools.description: Manage Storyblok headless-CMS spaces and components.

tools.name: Sanity CLI
tools.description: Scaffold and manage Sanity Studio projects.

tools.name: React Native CLI
tools.description: Bare React Native projects (without Expo).

tools.name: Expo CLI
tools.description: Run, build, and debug Expo React Native apps.

tools.name: EAS CLI
tools.description: Expo Application Services — cloud builds, submits, OTA updates.

tools.name: create-expo-app
tools.description: Scaffolder for new Expo projects.

tools.name: Watchman
tools.description: File-watching daemon by Meta. Required by React Native/Metro for fast rebuilds.

tools.name: Git
tools.description: Version control. Reinstalled via Homebrew with sane global defaults.

tools.name: Git Flow (AVH)
tools.description: Git Flow branching model commands. AVH is the maintained fork.

tools.name: GitHub CLI (gh)
tools.description: PRs, issues, and releases from the terminal.

tools.name: GitHub Desktop
tools.description: GUI Git client tightly integrated with GitHub.

tools.name: Visual Studio Code
tools.description: Microsoft's editor. Installed with a curated 20+ extension pack.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: AI-first fork of VS Code with built-in chat and code edits.

tools.name: TextMate
tools.description: Lightweight macOS editor — handy for quick edits outside the main editor.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Anthropic's terminal coding agent.

tools.name: kiro-cli
tools.description: AWS agentic coding CLI. Installed via the official kiro install script.

tools.name: OpenCode
tools.description: Open-source terminal coding agent (via sst/tap).

tools.name: Android Studio
tools.description: Official IDE for Android. Sets `ANDROID_HOME` + PATH for SDK tools.

tools.name: Rectangle
tools.description: Keyboard-driven window snapping (halves, quarters, thirds).

tools.name: Maccy
tools.description: Clipboard history manager. Trigger with a hotkey, fuzzy-search past copies.

tools.name: Obsidian
tools.description: Markdown-based notes with linked references and a graph view.

tools.name: 1Password CLI
tools.description: Read secrets from 1Password in scripts and shells.

tools.name: Google Chrome
tools.description: Reference browser for testing and DevTools work.

tools.name: Firefox
tools.description: Second engine to test against — different rendering and DevTools.

tools.name: Brave Browser
tools.description: Chromium-based browser with built-in tracker/ad blocking.

tools.name: OrbStack
tools.description: Lightweight Docker / Linux VM alternative to Docker Desktop.

tools.name: Postman
tools.description: API client for designing, testing, and documenting HTTP requests.

tools.name: Mockoon
tools.description: Local mock API server. Spin up fake REST endpoints in seconds.

tools.name: Expo Orbit
tools.description: Menubar launcher for Expo dev builds and iOS/Android simulators.

tools.name: Figma
tools.description: Design and prototyping tool. Desktop app gives Sign In + local fonts.

tools.name: ImageOptim
tools.description: Drag-and-drop lossless image compression (PNG/JPEG/SVG).

tools.name: WireGuard
tools.description: Modern fast VPN client.

tools.name: DevToys
tools.description: Swiss-army knife of small dev utilities (JSON formatter, hash, regex, base64…).

tools.name: Signal
tools.description: End-to-end encrypted messenger.

tools.name: WiFiman
tools.description: Wi-Fi analyzer + speed test from Ubiquiti.

tools.name: AppCleaner
tools.description: Properly uninstall macOS apps, including their support files.

tools.name: Ice
tools.description: Menubar organizer — hide and group items in the macOS menubar.

tools.name: Syncthing
tools.description: Peer-to-peer file sync across your own devices.

tools.name: Wireshark
tools.description: Packet analyzer for deep network debugging.

tools.name: PostgreSQL 15
tools.description: Relational database server. PATH wired via `~/.zshenv`.

tools.name: DBeaver Community Edition
tools.description: Cross-platform SQL GUI for Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, and many more.

tools.name: pgAdmin 4
tools.description: Official Postgres GUI — better for Postgres-specific features.

tools.name: Supabase CLI
tools.description: Run Supabase locally, push migrations, manage projects.

tools.name: ngrok
tools.description: Public HTTPS tunnel to a local port — share dev servers and webhooks.

tools.name: eza
tools.description: Modern `ls` replacement with colors, icons, and git status.

tools.name: wget
tools.description: Recursive HTTP/FTP downloader. Better than `curl` for whole-site mirrors.

tools.name: jq
tools.description: Command-line JSON processor. Filter, transform, query JSON in pipelines.

tools.name: tree
tools.description: Visualize directory structures as a tree.

tools.name: fzf
tools.description: Fuzzy finder. Bound to Ctrl-T (files) and Alt-C (cd) in your shell.

tools.name: ripgrep (rg)
tools.description: Extremely fast recursive grep. Respects `.gitignore` by default.

tools.name: fd
tools.description: Friendly, fast `find` replacement.

tools.name: bat
tools.description: `cat` clone with syntax highlighting and git integration.

tools.name: git-delta
tools.description: Syntax-highlighted diff viewer. Wired as Git's pager.

tools.name: zoxide
tools.description: Smarter `cd` — jumps to recent/frequent dirs by partial name.

tools.name: lazygit
tools.description: Terminal UI for Git. Staging, branches, rebases without leaving the keyboard.

tools.name: direnv
tools.description: Per-directory env vars. Drop a `.envrc`, allow it once, vars load automatically.

tools.name: atuin
tools.description: Searchable shell history with full context. Owns Ctrl-R after install.

tools.name: tldr (tealdeer)
tools.description: Quick example-based man pages. Run `tldr tar` instead of reading the manual.

tools.name: btop
tools.description: Modern resource monitor with mouse support. Replaces `top`/`htop`.

tools.name: dust
tools.description: More intuitive `du` — bar charts of disk usage by directory.

tools.name: duf
tools.description: Colorful `df` — clearer view of mounted disks and free space.

tools.name: UpCloud CLI (upctl)
tools.description: Manage UpCloud infrastructure from the terminal.

tools.name: kubectl
tools.description: Kubernetes CLI. Inspect resources, apply manifests, exec into pods.

tools.name: Tilt
tools.description: Local Kubernetes dev loop — watch, build, deploy on save.

tools.name: Terraform
tools.description: Infrastructure-as-code. Installed from HashiCorp's tap (BSL license).

tools.name: Fira Code
tools.description: Programming font with ligatures (`!==` → `≠`, `=>` → `→`).

tools.name: JetBrains Mono
tools.description: Highly legible monospace font with ligatures, by JetBrains.

tools.name: Source Code Pro
tools.description: Adobe's open-source monospace family for code.

tools.name: Hack Nerd Font
tools.description: Hack plus Nerd Font glyphs — required for PowerLevel10k icons.

tools.name: xcodes
tools.description: Manage multiple Xcode versions side by side.

tools.name: ios-deploy
tools.description: Deploy and debug iOS apps on physical devices from the command line.

tools.name: CocoaPods
tools.description: Dependency manager for iOS/macOS projects.

tools.name: SwiftLint
tools.description: Linter for Swift code, enforcing style and conventions.

tools.name: Maestro
tools.description: Mobile UI testing framework. `maestro studio` records flows visually.

tools.name: macOS defaults tweaks
tools.description: Fast key repeat, no auto-correct, expanded save panels, show hidden files, Dock autohide, screenshots to ~/Screenshots, etc. Reversible.
